About Me

Hey! I'm Sierra — a cybersecurity engineer from Augusta, Georgia, home of The Masters ⛳. I'm currently pursuing my M.S. in Information Systems & Computer Security at Tuskegee University, where I also completed my B.S. in Computer Science with a 3.6 GPA.

I put God first in everything I do. I'm passionate about defending systems, thinking like an attacker, and making the digital world safer. I hold a CyberCorps SFS Scholarship and am committed to federal cybersecurity service at agencies like NSA, CISA, or DoD.

Cybersecurity Projects
IoT Intrusion Detection System
Apr 2026
ISCS 531 — Network Security · Tuskegee University
98.88% accuracy  ·  F1: 0.9895
Built and deployed a machine learning IDS using SVM trained on the NSL-KDD dataset. Integrated into a live IoT pipeline: NodeMCU ESP8266 → Node.js backend → Python Flask API for real-time attack detection on Kali Linux.
💡 Successfully detected simulated FTP brute force and root shell exploitation attacks in real time using a physical ESP8266 device over a live Wi-Fi hotspot.

ESP8266 IoT Purple Team Lab
Apr 2026
Personal Project
Full red + blue team cycle
Deployed a NodeMCU ESP8266 as a simulated IoT target. Performed red team recon using Nmap (port scanning, fingerprinting, banner grabbing), then hardened the device and produced a formal security assessment report.
💡 Identified version disclosure and unauthenticated data leakage — patched all findings and re-verified with a second scan to confirm remediation.

Experience
General Infomatics — NAVAIR, Patuxent River, MD
Jun – Aug 2025
IT & Cybersecurity Intern
  • Hardened Windows, Ubuntu, and RHEL systems in air-gapped environments for Authorization to Operate (ATO).
  • Applied DoD STIGs using STIG Viewer, improving compliance posture and reducing attack surface vulnerabilities.
  • Conducted vulnerability scanning and remediation using SCAP and ACAS tools.
  • Supported RMF documentation with auditable test procedures aligned to NIST 800-53 controls.
  • Built secure systems from scratch: BIOS setup, disk partitioning, OS installation, and offline patching in classified environments.
Finastra Corporation — Virtual
Jul – Sep 2023
Incident Response Intern
  • Analyzed and reported phishing email attempts targeting corporate and investor communications, identifying common tactics and risks.
  • Updated and documented incident response playbooks for handling phishing and email-based security threats.
  • Supported internal security awareness by tracking phishing trends and helping improve detection and response processes.
CHITRA Productions — NAVAIR, Patuxent River, MD
Jun – Aug 2024
Software Developer Intern
  • Designed and developed a new feature for an acoustic software testing application, automating extraction of test configurations from the GUI into development files.
  • Reduced configuration process from 30 minutes to 5 minutes per test — a 6x improvement — and eliminated 90% of manual configuration errors.
  • Implemented file I/O, conditionals, and data manipulation techniques to improve workflow accuracy in a mission-critical testing environment.
